note: SNG-193. A tradition has a ROOT; a school is what that root reaches WITH. Same tradition, same abilities, different extension source, different best-ground. A school NEVER grants exclusive abilities — the moment it does it becomes a subclass and the tradition fractures.
ruling: Erik 2026-07-19: authored per culture, not a uniform grid. Counts differ because peoples differ. FOUR sources, including the PURE school (extension null) — the root alone, never starved, lower ceiling. 'The pure never loses because it never leaned on anything.'

mechanics.extension: The school sets the extension source and therefore the BAND. The root's contribution is unchanged.
mechanics.floor: A material ROOT (or a material-extension school) is never starved anywhere. A tradition rooted in inherent or lattice has no floor unless a school supplies one — which is why the material school of an inherent people is the one that travels.
mechanics.notGating: Schools do not gate abilities. Most abilities belong to the ROOT and every school of that tradition has them. Only a minority are natively school-expressed, marked with schoolAffinity, and even those are learnable by any school of the tradition — awkwardly, which is where braids come from.
mechanics.changing: A school is learnable, not innate. Changing is possible, hard, and a story.
mechanics.openSlots: Deliberately incomplete. Extensions no culture has authored yet are ROOM, not gaps — a braid discovered in play (like Silas's Double Register) may name a school that did not exist before.

schools.name: The Unaided
schools.why: Mind alone, joined to nothing. Never starved anywhere, and they will tell you so.

schools.name: The Reaching Mind
schools.why: Thought as contact. They hold that a model held perfectly enough TOUCHES the thing.

schools.name: The Instrumented
schools.why: Mind through machine. Telekinesis is not moving a thing — it is addressing it.

schools.name: The Unsettled
schools.why: Thought that will not stay put. Brilliant, and no two sessions alike.

schools.name: The Plain Wardens
schools.why: Endings, and nothing else. The oldest form and the least comfortable.

schools.name: The Grave-Handed
schools.why: The physical craft of endings — bodies, ground, the work of hands. The only Ashwardens who are never at a loss in dense country.

schools.name: The Recorders
schools.why: Endings written down where the lattice will hold them. Archivists of the dead.

schools.name: The Rot-Kind
schools.why: Decay as an ungoverned process. Feared even in the Palelands.

marcher.rootNote: skill at arms in a body

schools.name: The Plain Edge
schools.why: The edge and the body. Nothing to take away, nowhere it fails.

schools.name: The Death-Edged
schools.why: They feel the ending in the strike before it lands. Rare, and quiet about it.

schools.name: The Quickened
schools.why: Reflex augmented. Devastating in the Gearlands, ordinary in the Quickwood.

schools.name: The Unadorned
schools.why: The body, finished. They consider every other school a shortcut.

schools.name: The Breathing Ones
schools.why: The body as a place the world moves through.

schools.name: The Tuned
schools.why: Retuning the flesh with what the flesh was built from.

schools.name: The Plain Course
schools.why: Stone, weight, and the hand. The Masons' orthodoxy, and most of them.

schools.name: The Deep-Cut
schools.why: Those who mine INTO the Precursor bones and use what they find.

schools.name: The Long-Settled
schools.why: Stone as something that has been standing a long time and knows it.

schools.name: The Green Way
schools.why: Growth, direct. The Quickwood's own form.

schools.name: The Grafted
schools.why: Hands, grafts, husbandry — the practical growers, and the only Rootkin who work well abroad.

schools.name: The Wildwood
schools.why: Growth that was never asked for.

schools.name: The Plainsong
schools.why: Grief carried, unaugmented. It is enough.

schools.name: The Deep-Feeling
schools.why: Feeling as an instrument that touches what it is aimed at.

schools.name: The Carried Voice
schools.why: Sorrow given reach through the lattice. Controversial among their own.

verist.rootNote: speech and the nerve to use it

schools.name: The Plain Word
schools.why: Say what is so. Nothing else is needed and nothing else is offered.

schools.name: The Weighted Word
schools.why: Truth as a thing in the world that a true statement makes contact with.

schools.name: The Kept
schools.why: The vow, held. The Stillhold's whole answer.

schools.name: The Standing Watch
schools.why: Those who keep the peace with their bodies when the vow is not enough.

schools.name: The Instrumented Dark
schools.why: The lattice, read in the absence of light. The Underlight's own school.

schools.name: The Deep Dark
schools.why: Dark as a thing that exists, not merely as an absence of light.

schools.name: The Trained Eye
schools.why: Discipline and practice, no reaching at all. The school that works everywhere.

schools.name: The Wrights
schools.why: The Engine and its tending. Orthodoxy, and the great majority.

schools.name: The Hand-Built
schools.why: Those who build what will run without the lattice. Quietly the most travelled Enginewrights.

schools.name: The Listeners
schools.why: Those who hold that the Engine has been tending them back, and attend to it.

schools.name: The Standing Order
schools.why: The lattice, worked as built. The Cities' own form.

schools.name: The Measurers
schools.why: Instruments, standards, calibration. They keep the count and mistrust everything else.

schools.name: The Burning
schools.why: Light through the lattice, at full.

schools.name: The Ember-Kept
schools.why: Fire, fuel, and a hand. What is left when the lattice thins — and the school that survives travel.

schools.name: The Forming
schools.why: Formcraft as built.

schools.name: The Seeing
schools.why: Those who hold that the pattern is already there and they only find it.

schools.name: The Keeping
schools.why: The Kept Count and its instruments. The canonical form.

schools.name: The Patient
schools.why: Those who keep time by waiting, and consider the instruments a convenience.

schools.name: The Choir
schools.why: Continuous with the world before. They never stopped.

schools.name: The Descended
schools.why: Those who let the frequencies go and found something underneath. Rare, and not spoken of warmly.

schools.name: Toward the Unbodied
schools.why: Dissolution into practice. The Reach's own road, and its cult of purity.

schools.name: The Old Habit
schools.why: Those who still work the lattice out of long practice. Most of them, honestly.

schools.name: The Standing Ones
schools.why: Those who stayed embodied on purpose, and consider that the harder discipline.

schools.name: The Plain Proof
schools.why: Reason, unaided. It does not need help and they resent the suggestion.

schools.name: The Binding Proof
schools.why: Those who make a proof BIND — reason as contact with what is actually so.

schools.name: The Engined
schools.why: Reason at scale, through apparatus.

schools.name: The Hand
schools.why: Craft, unaugmented. It works anywhere, and Wrights travel.

schools.name: The Quickened Work
schools.why: Making that reaches for the lattice when the hand is not enough.

schools.name: The Living Work
schools.why: Those whose made things carry something. Huginn's makers.

schools.name: The Walking
schools.why: The road, on foot. Never starved, and they have seen everything.

schools.name: The Folding
schools.why: Those who shorten the road. The Deep Works' messengers.

schools.name: The Far-Seeing
schools.why: Distance as a thing you can attend to rather than cross.

schools.name: The Riding
schools.why: The churn, ridden. If they have other schools they will not admit it.

schools.name: The Hand-Made
schools.why: Churnfolk who build things that stay built. Regarded as eccentrics.

schools.name: The Lucky
schools.why: Those who hold that the churn is attending to something, and try to attend back.

schools.name: The Descent
schools.why: The Descent as walked. Their own form.

schools.name: The Bargainers
schools.why: Terms, ledgers, and a handshake. The Abyssal school that travels — and the one you can hold to a deal.

schools.name: The Deep-Listening
schools.why: Those who commune rather than bargain.

schools.name: Ruinwork
schools.why: Ending things well. The Wild Half's undertakers.

schools.name: The Breaking Hand
schools.why: Demolition as a trade. Practical, portable, unglamorous.

schools.name: The Letting-Go
schools.why: Those who hold that a thing ends when its meaning does, and attend to that instead.

schools.name: Falsecraft
schools.why: Illusion through the lattice. The Mirrorlands' own.

schools.name: The Plain Lie
schools.why: Misdirection with no apparatus at all — costume, timing, and nerve. Works everywhere.

schools.name: The Seeming
schools.why: Those who hold that a thing believed hard enough IS, briefly.
